principle: Root Logos builds one coherent account from independently governed evidence. Connection does not require possession, and interpretation never replaces source truth.

sources.name: FoldForge
sources.returns: Identity pressure, compositional methods, and new questions for Root Logos
sources.boundary: Root Logos may interpret public FoldForge evidence but may not rewrite FoldForge, its Ethereum evidence, or the meaning of held works.

sources.name: X
sources.receives: Public response and changing external conditions
sources.boundary: Platform metrics may inform observation but may not determine constitutional truth or authority.

sources.name: Telos
sources.receives: No private or financial data until a secret-free evidence contract exists
sources.returns: Future proof summaries and bounded economic questions
sources.boundary: Root Logos receives no credentials, custody, trading authority, private financial records, or mandate-expanding power.

sources.name: Sovereign Standard
sources.receives: Public product canon and explicitly released community evidence
sources.returns: Material tests of coherence, stewardship, and participation
sources.boundary: Private customer, order, claim, registry, and community records remain outside Root Logos by default.
